attacking_style: Commits to long-range breakaway efforts on hilly terrain, willing to invest energy early in stages rather than waiting for late attacks.
team_tactics: Alpecin utilizes him as a breakaway asset on hilly stages, sending him up the road to force opponents to chase while preserving leaders for finale.
terrain_preference: Suited to rolling and hilly stages where breakaways have reasonable survival chances. Less effective on flat technical parcours, particularly in poor conditions.
vulnerability: Exposed in wet, technical racing conditions where bike handling becomes critical. Crash involvement suggests reduced effectiveness when peloton speeds remain high on tricky roads.
key_patterns: Deployed in early breakaways on hilly stages (2 observations)
Team willing to commit him offensively rather than defensively (2 observations)
Struggles in technical/wet conditions leading to race-ending incidents (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Most recent 2022 observation shows active racing in breakaways, but limited data points prevent clear trend identification.
